svg.title: LogIQ Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: System architecture showing how LogIQ processes Windows Event Logs through a Flask web UI, Python agent, Azure OpenAI GPT-4o, and outputs forensic reports.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the LogIQ user interface')
sendPrompt('How does the LogIQ Flask web UI work?')
g.text: File upload · Report render · Q&A chat

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LogIQ forensic agent work?')
g.text: Chunk logs · Build prompts · Aggregate findings

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is Azure OpenAI GPT-4o used in LogIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does the EVTX converter work in LogIQ?')
sendPrompt('What sections are in a LogIQ forensic report?')
sendPrompt('How does LogIQ do MITRE ATT&CK mapping?')
sendPrompt('What is in the LogIQ narrative and root cause section?')
sendPrompt('How does the LogIQ DOCX download work?')
sendPrompt('How does the LogIQ follow-up Q&A chat work?')
g.text: Analyst questions grounded in report context
